_comment_hotkey: Use 'cmd+shift+space' on macOS, 'ctrl+shift+space' on Windows/Linux. Other keys: 'alt+space', 'f8', etc.
_comment_model: Sizes: tiny (fast, lower accuracy) | base (recommended) | small (better) | medium (much better, slow) | large-v3 (best, very slow on CPU)
_comment_language: null = auto-detect. Set to 'en', 'hi', 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'zh', 'ja', etc. for better accuracy.
_comment_device: 'cpu' works everywhere. Use 'cuda' if you have an NVIDIA GPU (much faster).
